sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mei sung, Humpi kuasung khiat thuak,
Aw bangzah in i lungdam hiam?
Ei zong sih dong i thuak

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hih hang lungsim siangtak tawh om,
Tua bang mite i sun ding hi,
Ei zong sih dong i thuak ngam ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tual leh gal ki do na sungah,
Ei zong sih dong i thuak ngam ding.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tual leh gal zong i it ding hi,
Topa hong itna thu gen ni,
Ei zong sih dong i thuak ngam
